title: cheilanthes buchtienii
intro: Cheilanthes buchtienii, also known as the Butch's cloak fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cheilanthes buchtienii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, sore throats, and bronchitis. Cheilanthes buchtienii is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used as a poultice or compress to aid in wound healing and reduce pain.
